title: TRAILBLAZER‐ALZ 4: A phase 3 trial comparing donanemab with aducanumab on amyloid plaque clearance in early, symptomatic Alzheimer's disease
authors: S. Salloway; Andrew Pain; Elly Lee; Michelle Papka; Margaret B Ferguson; Hong Wang; Haoyan B Hu; M. Lu; Ena Oru; P. Ardayfio; Deirdre B Hoban; E. Collins; D. Brooks; J. Sims
abstract: The phase 3, open‐label TRAILBLAZER‐ALZ 4 study compared the effect of donanemab versus aducanumab on amyloid plaque (AP) clearance in participants with early symptomatic Alzheimer's disease.
